---
title: "Coverage"
page-layout: full
---

## Coverage resources

- [Published coverage summary](coverage/index.html)
- [Interactive line-by-line report](coverage/report.html)
- [Codecov project](https://codecov.io/gh/arnabaich96/CausalMixGPD)
- [Coverage map](https://github.com/arnabaich96/CausalMixGPD/blob/master/tests/testthat/COVERAGE_MAP.md)
- [coverage_status() docs](pkgdown/reference/coverage_status.html)
- [read_coverage_status() docs](pkgdown/reference/read_coverage_status.html)

The tracked coverage artifacts live in `covr/assets/` and are mirrored to `docs/coverage/` for the published site.
Coverage is generated locally and checked in. GitHub Actions uploads the committed `covr/assets/cobertura.xml` report to Codecov on each push and exits successfully when no valid report is present.

## Related developer pages

- [Developers hub](developers/index.qmd)
- [Testing](developers/testing.qmd)
- [Tools](developers/tools.qmd)
